qids.subject: Computer Organization & Architecture
qids.prose: A -way set-associative cache memory unit with a capacity of KB is built using a block size of words. The word length is bits. The size of the physical address space is GB. The number of bits for the TAG field is ____

qids.subject: Computer Organization & Architecture
qids.prose: The memory access time is nanosecond for a read operation with a hit in cache, nanoseconds for a read operation with a miss in cache, nanoseconds for a write operation with a hit in cache and nanoseconds for a write operation with a miss in cache. Execution of a sequence of instructions involves ins

qids.subject: Computer Organization & Architecture
qids.prose: Assume that for a certain processor, a read request takes on a cache miss and on a cache hit. Suppose while running a program, it was observed that of the processor's read requests result in a cache hit. The average read access time in nanoseconds is ______.

qids.subject: Computer Organization & Architecture
qids.prose: Consider a machine with a byte addressable main memory of bytes, block size of bytes and a direct mapped cache having cache lines. Let the addresses of two consecutive bytes in main memory be and . What are the tag and cache line addresses ( in hex) for main memory address ? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Computer Organization & Architecture
qids.prose: The width of the physical address on a machine is bits. The width of the tag field in a KB -way set associative cache is ________ bits.
